div.class: o_control_panel d-flex flex-column gap-3 px-3 pt-2 pb-3
o_control_panel_main d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2 flex-grow-1
d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center gap-0 px-4 bg-white border-bottom

div.t-att-class: 'alert alert-' + state.existingOrderPaymentBanner.variant + ' rounded-0 mb-0 py-2 px-4 text-center border-0 border-bottom small'

div.div: Items in this order Review only — edit on the Cart step

div.class: d-flex gap-3 px-4 py-3 align-items-start border-bottom user-select-none

t.t-if: !item.isAddon and item.date and item.startTime and item.endTime

div.class: bg-white rounded-3 border overflow-hidden sticky-top shadow-sm
px-4 py-3 border-bottom fw-bold d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

t.t-if: !item.isAddon and item.date and item.startTime and item.endTime

div.div: Cannot place order — event zip is not in service area

div.label: Payment Method

div.div: Card details are used only to capture payment and are not saved in full.
This payment method is not yet integrated. Select Cash or Check to process payment.

button.t-att-disabled: state.payment.processing or !['cash','check','credit_card'].includes(state.payment.method) or !state.additional.weatherPolicyAgreed or !state.additional.setupTermsAgreed or state.placingOrder or state.payment.enabled or (state.event.zipStatus === 'not_available' and !state.event.stillDeliver)

!state.additional.weatherPolicyAgreed or !state.additional.setupTermsAgreed or state.placingOrder or state.payment.enabled or (state.event.zipStatus === 'not_available' and !state.event.stillDeliver) or !!state.existingPosOrderId

div.class: px-3 py-2 border-bottom d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between
d-flex flex-column align-items-center py-3 border-end bg-white
d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-center flex-grow-1 p-5 text-muted
row row-cols-2 row-cols-sm-3 row-cols-md-3 row-cols-xl-4 g-3
card h-100 overflow-hidden rounded-4 border-0 shadow
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center px-3 py-2 bg-white
d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-center flex-grow-1 p-5 text-muted
card h-100 shadow-sm border-0 rounded-4 overflow-hidden
d-flex gap-3 px-4 py-3 align-items-start border-bottom

div.div: Edit Date & Time for All Items

div.class: d-flex align-items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 border-bottom flex-wrap

div.div: No add-ons available for selected products.

div.class: px-4 py-3 border-bottom fw-semibold d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

t.t-if: !item.isAddon and item.date and item.startTime and item.endTime

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 border rounded
position-absolute w-100 bg-white border rounded shadow-sm

select.option: How did you hear about us?

div.class: position-absolute w-100 bg-white border rounded shadow-sm

div.div: IMPORTANT: The zip code MUST MATCH the EVENT ZIP CODE (not billing). If not listed, verify franchise territory ownership via intranet or contact corporate.
This zip code is not in our service area. Please verify with corporate before proceeding.

div.p: For your protection we offer a damage waiver for 10% of your rental fee. We will waive any damage that happens to our equipment during your rental excluding intentional damage or theft.

select.option: Yes - I want to be protected against accidental damage (10%)
No - I will take full responsibility for accidental, intentional, & theft during my rental period

div.p: Are you having your event at a park, church, school or business (anything non-residential)?

If your reservation is cancelled due to inclement weather, your deposit can be applied to a future date. This rain check will not expire. Once equipment is delivered, there will be no rain check or refunds. Customer agrees to full policy on our website at freedomfunusa.com.

div.label: I agree to the weather and payment policy above

div.p: We do not set up on rock or gravel. You will need to provide a separate circuit for each item ordered. Units must have electricity located within 50' ft.

div.label: I agree to the setup and electrical terms above

div.class: bg-white rounded-3 border overflow-hidden sticky-top shadow-sm
px-4 py-3 border-bottom fw-bold d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

t.t-if: !item.isAddon and item.date and item.startTime and item.endTime

div.div: Cannot place order — event zip is not in service area

button.t-att-disabled: !isCheckoutValid() or !state.additional.weatherPolicyAgreed or !state.additional.setupTermsAgreed or state.placingOrder or state.payment.enabled or (state.event.zipStatus === 'not_available' and !state.event.stillDeliver)

div.class: d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-center flex-grow-1 p-5 text-center

p.t: Your rental order has been successfully created.
Your quote has been successfully created and sent to the customer.

div.div: Payment received in full. A confirmation email has been sent to the customer.
Quote email sent to customer. They can pay in full or with a 30% deposit.
Remaining invoice created and sent to customer.
